_comment: Copy this file to settings.json to configure the WebViewer deployment.

pluginConfig._comment: Per-plugin configuration. Missing keys fall back to built-in defaults.

orientationGizmo._comment: Viewport orientation gizmo (top-right corner). Set enabled: false to hide.

kiosk._comment: Kiosk Mode — opt-in auto-demo after idle timeout. Default is DISABLED (backwards-compatible for existing deployments). Trade-show / showroom installations set enabled: true.

gaussian-splat._comment: Gaussian Splat overlay — load photorealistic 3D scans (.splat/.ply/.ksplat) as environment backdrop.
